channel.title: Learning on TechByJR
channel.description: Recent content in Learning on TechByJR

item.title: Unsure? Start here!
item.description:
TL:DR

👋 Welcome to Your IT Journey!

Ready to dive into the exciting world of Information Technology? We’re thrilled to have you! Before we blast off, let’s quickly make sure you have a few simple, essential items right on your chosen device. Think of these as your basic travel kit for our adventure!

🚀 Your Essential Prerequisites

These are easy to set up and crucial for a smooth learning experience:

  • A Reliable Internet Connection: Whether you rely on your cell phone’s data, a handy mobile hotspot, your secure home Wi-Fi, or even public Wi-Fi, a stable connection is your key to success.
  • Consistent Data Access: We’ll be using the internet a lot! If you have limited data, we highly encourage you to take advantage of great public resources like your local library or a friendly spot such as your local Donut shop. Don’t worry—we will dedicate time to showing you exactly how to work effectively and safely when you’re connected in public places.

🗺️ Our Learning Approach: Concepts First, Then the How-To!

We totally get it—every device is a little different! That’s why we’ve designed a clear, two-step learning method:

  1. We’ll first cover a complete, foundational concept (the why and the what).
  2. Then, we’ll immediately provide a tailored, step-by-step “how-to” guide for various platforms (the how).

Brief overview

Sometimes things get a bit overexplained to ensure that everyone understands and things need to be covered quickly. Here’s a brief review of what we covered:

Essentials

  1. Reliable internet connection - Making sure you have a signal
  2. Consistent data access - Making sure you have unlimited data

Learning approach

  1. Why and what
  2. Step by step guide for various platforms

Our very next article, Learning IT Today is the perfect place to start!

In that article, we’ll provide some interesting tools that will be used and how they will be used to thoroughly explore the concepts of freemium modern applications, their security features, and some of the best simplified explanations to confusing IT concepts at no cost. These tools will help us review more complex concepts later in an easy-to-understand way.

Let’s get started by clicking the following image

44

item.title: Learning IT today
item.description:
👋 Hi and welcome back to your IT Journey!

Let’s continue by diving into the exciting world of Modern cloud accounts and applications accessible from your mobile device. We’re thrilled to have you! Before we blast off, let’s quickly make sure you have a few simple, essential items right on your chosen device. Think of these as your basic travel kit for our adventure!

Essentials

  1. Reliable internet connection - Making sure you have a signal
  2. Consistent data access - Making sure you have unlimited data

Learning approach

  1. Why and what
  2. Step by step guide for various platforms

In this article, we’re covering how to create a linux shell script which is considered an application which is very lack luster in celebration once you understand the concepts.

Here is our script:

Select your device to follow along in your phone ecosystem

iPhone image Android image side by side

We’ll kick things off with the Apple iPhone, but please know that all core concepts will be clearly covered for devices like Android handhelds, Android tablets, iPads, and many others. We’ll also leverage powerful cloud capabilities to ensure a useful, unified, and truly exciting learning experience across all platforms!

First let’s download the needed application which is called iSH Shell for the iPhone. That application can be downloaded by clicking the following **link or searching for the application using the Apple app store.

Here is what the iSH Shell application looks like from the Apple App store

44

Our very next article, How to make an app , is the perfect place to start!

In that article, we’ll thoroughly explore the concept of modern email, its security features, and some of the cool applications that come with it. These tools will help us review more complex concepts later in an easy-to-understand way.

item.title: How to make an app?!
item.description:
👋 Hi and welcome back to your IT Journey!

Let’s continue by diving into the exciting world of How to make an app from your mobile device. We’re thrilled to have you! Before we blast off, let’s quickly make sure you have a few simple, essential items right on your chosen device. Think of these as your basic travel kit for our adventure!

🚀 Your Essential Prerequisites

These are easy to set up and absolutely crucial for a smooth learning experience:

  • A Consistent Internet Connection
  • Reliable Data Access

🗺️ Our Learning Approach: Concepts First, Then the How-To!

We totally get it—every device is a little different! That’s why we’ve designed a clear, two-step learning method:

  1. We’ll first cover a complete, foundational concept (the why and the what).
  2. Then, we’ll immediately provide a tailored, step-by-step “how-to” guide for various platforms (the how).

Our very next article, How to make an app , is the perfect place to start!

In that article, we’ll thoroughly explore the concept of modern email, its security features, and some of the cool applications that come with it. These tools will help us review more complex concepts later in an easy-to-understand way. We’ll kick things off with the Apple iPhone, but please know that all core concepts will be clearly covered for devices like Android handhelds, Android tablets, iPads, and many others. We’ll also leverage powerful cloud capabilities to ensure a useful, unified, and truly exciting learning experience across all platforms!

item.title: Github experience
item.description:
👋 Hi and welcome back to your IT Journey!

Let’s continue by diving into the exciting world of Modern email. We’re thrilled to have you! Before we blast off, let’s quickly make sure you have a few simple, essential items right on your chosen device. Think of these as your basic travel kit for our adventure!

🚀 Your Essential Prerequisites

These are easy to set up and absolutely crucial for a smooth learning experience:

  • A Consistent Internet Connection
  • A Modern Email Account
  • Reliable Data Access

🗺️ Modern email essentials

🚀 Your Next Adventure: Embracing Modern Email Security with Gmail

Get ready to dive into the powerful features of a modern email platform! Our journey starts with Gmail, where we’ll unlock key Google benefits like password management, passkey creation, and seamless Single Sign-On (SSO) for the websites we’ll be using.

We know our security-focused users might raise an eyebrow at a cloud service recommendation, but rest assured, we’ll thoroughly explore and address the common security considerations associated with cloud providers in today’s IT landscape.

Getting Started

  • Already have a Gmail account? Great! Please sign in here

  • Need a Gmail account? Check out our [Gmail account creation video here].

Important Note on Browsers

To ensure the instructions are consistent and flow smoothly, please use the Google Chrome browser for all activities. Using Safari may cause discrepancies.

  • iPhone Users: If you don’t have Chrome, Click here.
  • Android Users: You already have Chrome!

Once you’re logged in, we will begin by reviewing Google’s integrated password management feature.

Heads Up: The initial visual instructions will focus on the iPhone interface. The Android-specific guide will follow soon after the iPhone article is published.

Our first step will be to open Google Chrome

(provide image here)

Click the three dots to open the browser menu

(provide image here)

Click the password manager icon

(provide image here)

item.title: Modern cloud account
item.description:
👋 Hi and welcome back to your IT Journey!

Let’s continue by diving into the exciting world of Modern email. We’re thrilled to have you! Before we blast off, let’s quickly make sure you have a few simple, essential items right on your chosen device. Think of these as your basic travel kit for our adventure!

🚀 Your Essential Prerequisites

These are easy to set up and absolutely crucial for a smooth learning experience:

  • A Consistent Internet Connection
  • A Modern Email Account
  • Reliable Data Access

🗺️ Modern email essentials

🚀 Your Next Adventure: Embracing Modern Email Security with Gmail

Get ready to dive into the powerful features of a modern email platform! Our journey starts with Gmail, where we’ll unlock key Google benefits like password management, passkey creation, and seamless Single Sign-On (SSO) for the websites we’ll be using.

We know our security-focused users might raise an eyebrow at a cloud service recommendation, but rest assured, we’ll thoroughly explore and address the common security considerations associated with cloud providers in today’s IT landscape.

Getting Started

  • Already have a Gmail account? Great! Please sign in here

  • Need a Gmail account? Check out our [Gmail account creation video here].

Important Note on Browsers

To ensure the instructions are consistent and flow smoothly, please use the Google Chrome browser for all activities. Using Safari may cause discrepancies.

  • iPhone Users: If you don’t have Chrome, Click here.
  • Android Users: You already have Chrome!

Once you’re logged in, we will begin by reviewing Google’s integrated password management feature.

Heads Up: The initial visual instructions will focus on the iPhone interface. The Android-specific guide will follow soon after the iPhone article is published.

Our first step will be to open Google Chrome

(provide image here)

Click the three dots to open the browser menu

(provide image here)

Click the password manager icon

(provide image here)
